plans.label: Baseline (No Deployment)
plans.description: No additional peacekeeping units or sensor arrays deployed. Only existing baseline police presence in each district.

plans.label: Northern Shield
plans.description: Peacekeeping units stationed at the two northern border districts — the primary agitation injection points. Sensor arrays cover the three highest-contagion interior districts to provide early warning of cascade.

plans.label: Eastern Watch
plans.description: Peacekeeping units guard both east and west border crossings. Sensor coverage on the northern border, the southern port, and the transit corridor for full perimeter awareness.

plans.label: Capital Fortress
plans.description: Peacekeeping units protect both Capital districts — the political and economic center. Sensor arrays deployed across all major peripheral districts to detect and warn of incoming unrest before it reaches the capital.

plans.label: Distributed Sensors
plans.description: No physical peacekeeping deployment. Instead, full sensor coverage across all 10 districts. Maximum situational awareness and early warning capability, but no physical deterrence or de-escalation capacity.

plans.label: Border Wall
plans.description: Peacekeeping units at all three border-adjacent districts. Maximum physical deterrence at the frontier. No sensor coverage in interior districts — relies on border containment preventing any interior cascade.
